lines.raw: What was the good news? | 好消息是什么？

lines.english: The secretary told me that Mr. Harmsworth would see me.
lines.chinese: 秘书告诉我哈姆斯沃思先生会见我。
lines.raw: The secretary told me that Mr. Harmsworth would see me. | 秘书告诉我哈姆斯沃思先生会见我。

lines.english: I felt very nervous when I went into his office.
lines.chinese: 当我走进他的办公室时，我感到非常紧张。
lines.raw: I felt very nervous when I went into his office. | 当我走进他的办公室时，我感到非常紧张。

lines.english: He did not look up from his desk when I entered.
lines.chinese: 我进去时，他没有从办公桌上抬起头。
lines.raw: He did not look up from his desk when I entered. | 我进去时，他没有从办公桌上抬起头。
After I had sat down, | 我坐下后，

lines.english: he said that business was very bad.
lines.raw: he said that business was very bad. | 他说生意很糟。

lines.english: He told me that the firm could not afford to pay such large salaries.
lines.chinese: 他告诉我公司负担不起支付如此高的薪水。
lines.raw: He told me that the firm could not afford to pay such large salaries. | 他告诉我公司负担不起支付如此高的薪水。
Twenty people had already left. | 已经有二十人离开了。

lines.english: I knew that my turn had come.
lines.raw: I knew that my turn had come. | 我知道轮到我了。

lines.english: 'Mr. Harmsworth,' I said in a weak voice.
lines.chinese: “哈姆斯沃思先生，”我用微弱的声音说。
lines.raw: 'Mr. Harmsworth,' I said in a weak voice. | “哈姆斯沃思先生，”我用微弱的声音说。
'Don't interrupt,' he said. | “不要打断，”他说。

lines.english: Then he smiled and told me I would receive an extra thousand pounds a year!
lines.chinese: 然后他笑了，告诉我每年将额外获得一千英镑！
lines.raw: Then he smiled and told me I would receive an extra thousand pounds a year! | 然后他笑了，告诉我每年将额外获得一千英镑！
